debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hsu : G.vertexSet ⊆ V(G, M)
M' : Set β
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
⊢ M'.encard ≤ M.encard

failed_attempts:
by_contra! h
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hM.exists_isAugPath_of_encard_lt_encard hM' h
    exact hP.first_not_in (hsu hP.first_mem)

by_contra! h
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hM.exists_isAugPath_of_encard_lt_encard hM' h

    exact hP.first_not_in (hsu hP.first_mem_V)

rw [← Enat.mul_le_mul_left_iff (by norm_num) (by norm_num), ← hM'.encard_V, ← hM.encard_V]
